name: Benahavís View Villas
description: Six private villas with open valley views, generous space and a quiet Benahavís setting.
seoDescription: Explore Benahavís View Villas, six private villas with panoramic views from EUR 1,950,000.
twitterDescription: Six private Benahavís villas with panoramic views, generous space and private pools.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Benahavís View Villas.

card.label: Panoramic Views
card.description: Six private villas with open valley views, generous space and a quiet Benahavís setting.

discovery.advisoryBadge: A small collection with more privacy

hero.alt: Benahavís View Villas contemporary villa with panoramic valley outlook

architecture.alt: Luxury villa interior opening to pool terrace and views
architecture.caption: Private villa architecture

privateViewing.alt: Private villa terrace with pool and elevated coastal atmosphere

copy: Benahavís View Villas is for buyers who want a spacious, private home with modern architecture and elevated views.
With only six villas, the right choice depends on the plot, direction, views and expected delivery.

why.copy: The project suits buyers who want privacy, space for family and guests, and a home they can use for longer stays or as a main residence.
points: Families and lifestyle buyers seeking a substantial private residence.
Only six villas, with more privacy and outdoor space than a larger development.
Benahavís is known for private villa areas, golf and elevated settings.
Each plot has different views and privacy, so the available villa matters.

architecture.headlineHtml: Modern villa design with space and privacy
copy: Large windows, open terraces and private pools connect the interiors with the surrounding landscape.
The villas offer more separation, outdoor space and flexibility for family life and guests.
highlights: Private pool and landscaped exterior space.
Generous layouts for longer stays or full-time living.

residences.copy: Each villa differs by plot, direction, pool position and interior layout. Ask us for the latest plans and technical details.

items.name: Signature Villas
features: More space for entertaining and guests.

items.name: Customised Options
features: Material upgrades subject to developer release.
Potential layout and finish selections by phase.

privateViewing.headlineHtml: Take a closer look at the villas
privateViewing.copy: Get the latest villa information and let us walk you through the plots, views, plans and availability.
insights: Private pools, large windows and terraces facing the views.
Limited villa collection with plot-by-plot differences.
Best suited to buyers who want privacy, space and longer stays.
Request the current villa file before shortlisting.

lifestyle.copy: Life here is quieter and more private than in a resort. You have space for family, a private pool, open views and easy access to golf and Marbella.
panels: The villas work well for longer stays, guests and everyday privacy.
The pool, terrace and garden are central to daily life.
Benahavís remains popular with buyers looking for private, high-quality villas.

location.copy: Benahavís is one of the Costa del Sol's best-known villa areas, with gated communities, golf and open views, while Marbella and Puerto Banús remain close.

investment.copy: Long-term appeal comes from the small number of villas, privacy, plot quality and continued demand for good homes in Benahavís. Rental returns are not assumed or promised.
cards: Limited villa releases can move quickly when view and plot quality are strong.
The latest plans explain the plots, specifications and payment schedule.
Privacy, generous space and good plots remain important to villa buyers.
The strongest reason to buy is the lifestyle, with future resale appeal as a secondary benefit.

trustDossier.copy: We review the plot, direction, specifications, delivery and purchase steps before you move forward.
cards: We check the position, privacy and views of each available villa.
We confirm materials, pool details, landscaping and optional upgrades.
Reservation and purchase steps are explained before you commit.
We can compare the villa with alternatives in Benahavís and the Marbella area.

items: Receive plot, floorplan and current availability material.
Review views, plots, prices and which option suits you.
Arrange a guided visit or digital review of preferred villas.
Confirm the reservation, legal checks and delivery details.

projectFile.copy: Ask us for the latest plot information, floorplans, prices and availability.
documents: Site layout and the position of each villa

availability.copy: We confirm the available villas, plot positions and latest prices before arranging a private viewing.

enquiry.copy: Ask for current availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will send the information that is relevant to you.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the latest information for Benahavís View Villas, including current villa availability, plot plans, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. We have received your Benahavís View Villas enquiry and will be in touch.
